name: Wipe Out The North
descriptionTemplate: When commanding armored units, deal +20% damage to non-building units other than city garrisons. If you are unable to attack or move after attacking, you have a X% chance to attack again (only once per turn). Each kill this turn increases this chance by 20% (max 100%), upgrading the effect to an extra action.

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding armored units, deal +20% damage to non-building units other than city garrisons. If you are unable to attack or move after attacking, you have a 20% chance to attack again (only once per turn). Each kill this turn increases this chance by 20% (max 100%), upgrading the effect to an extra action.
progression.renderedDescFr: Lorsque vous commandez des unités blindées, inflige +20% de dégâts to unités non-bâtiment hors garnisons de ville. Si vous ne pouvez pas attaquer ou de bouger après avoir attaqué, vous avez 20% de chance d'attaquer à nouveau (only once par tour). Chaque élimination ce tour-ci augmente cette chance de 20% (max 100%), améliorant l'effet en action supplémentaire.
